cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op() { resume(a) } } in E.op }
---
f : (A) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op() { a } } in E.op }
---
f : (A) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(x: A): B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): B / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op(x) { resume(b) } } in E.op(a) }
---
f : (A, B) -> B
==========
cap Choose { fn choose(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle Choose with bundle { fn choose() { a } } in { let x = Choose.choose; x } }
---
f : (A) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op1(): A; fn op2(x: A): B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op1() { resume(a) }; fn op2(x) { b } } in E.op1 }
---
f : (A, B) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op() { resume(a) } } in { let x = E.op; x } }
---
f : (A) -> A
